description_long: This house features a rustic, elevated design with a stone foundation and wooden upper structure, giving it a cabin-like appearance. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with dark, weathered shingles, and a small chimney protrudes from one side. The exterior walls are clad in vertical wooden planks, showing signs of age and exposure to the elements. Windows are simple, rectangular, and barred, with one on each visible side, providing symmetry to the facade. The lower level is constructed from rough stone, adding to the sturdy, traditional look, while the upper level is supported by wooden posts. The overall aesthetic suggests a rural or mountain setting, but it could also fit into a historic or themed urban neighborhood.
description: A rustic, elevated house with a stone base, wooden upper walls, and a steep shingled roof with a chimney. Barred windows and weathered textures give it a traditional, cabin-like appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden upper structure, stone lower level, two barred windows, and the full length of the shingled roof.
description_view_1: Gable-end view highlighting the triangular roof, centered barred window, and the stone foundation directly below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the chimney visible on the left side of the roof and similar window placement.
description_view_3: Front gable view with a prominent barred window, wooden planks, and supporting posts visible beneath the upper level.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with wooden posts supporting the upper level, no visible porch or decorative elements, and a single main door likely beneath the front window.
